name: FIRST_DISCLOSURE_YEAR_BY_TARGETPAIR
description: First disclosure year by targetpair. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (tp:TargetPair {name: $tp_name})<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
RETURN tp.name AS target_pair, min(y.year) AS first_year

examples: What is the first disclosure year for 4-1BB/5T4?
What is the first disclosure year for HER3/IGF1R?
What is the first disclosure year for FZD5/LRP6?
